svg.title: Chapter 17 Gate 2 protocol-corpus figure
svg.desc: Three stacked protocol-corpus panels showing framing median gain, completion median gain, and completion p95 gain across the Gate 2 environment matrix, each with bootstrap confidence intervals.
svg.text: Source gate2-protocol-corpus-v1 • 144 sites • 12371 resources • 6/6 primary cells pass
Framing gain stays near 72.252%–72.252% while median and p95 completion gains widen to 192 ms and 254.5 ms
Header/framing advantage is stable across the environment matrix
environment order: low RTT/low loss on the left, higher impairment on the right
Median completion savings increase as RTT, loss, and bandwidth pressure worsen
labels under points: r = RTT in ms, l = loss percent
Tail savings widen even more strongly under heavier impairment
filled green markers = primary cells, slate markers = non-primary cells
